sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84817" key="poluerw/menos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-ερώμενος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84817.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many lovers,</tr_> Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:p.326" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.326</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
